title: Basic content creation for blogs?
excerpt: I’m evaluating monday.com and while it has excellent organisational tools, where can I draft, edit, and store blog posts? I would also like to style headings in markdown. Basically something like Notion where it’s a very…

posts.author: CousinLarry (A)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m evaluating monday.com and while it has excellent organisational tools, where can I draft, edit, and store blog posts? I would also like to style headings in markdown. Basically something like Notion where it’s a very basic word processor.

Does anything like this exist for Monday?

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, @CousinLarry - Perhaps the new monday Docs feature will work for you? The beta of Monday Docs is now available.

To enable it, you will need to click on your avatar, then monday labs, and then Activate monday Docs - ﻿New Monday Docs is out earl...
﻿
﻿And you can learn all about this new feature here: ﻿https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360021702939

Enjoy your monday adventures!

~ Deb Cinkus
Product-certified Partner

posts.author: saggi (Saggi Neumann)
posts.cookedHtml:
Fast forward to November 2023… monday docs + Sundae for monday, the static website generator for monday makes creating a blog in monday a breeze!

Create your content in monday, using monday docs, and publish them on global CDNs, use your custom domain, manage SEO and add Google Analytics or other javascript to track your website performance.

It comes with a free plan and awesome support (should you need it :))

Check it out: https://sundae.so
